input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8665 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests using Base64.DONT_BREAK_LINES or Base64.decodeToObject will not compile against 2.38.0 because those APIs were removed; tests should use the current Base64 encode/decode methods instead.
Meaningful coverage should stay focused on commons utilities and avoid assuming a running ActiveMQ Artemis broker, since this artifact is not the broker/server module.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0 is a standalone utilities artifact with normal Maven transitive dependencies; the reported javac failure is due to an API change in Base64, not missing setup.
